sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_hei_editor_t (personnelid,incontrolleve,editableid,editablename,validflag,addoperator,addoperatorid,departmentid,addtime,memo) VALUES ($personnelid$,$incontrolleve$,'$editableid$','$editablename$',1,'$addoperator$',$addoperatorid$,$departmentid$,'$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_hei_editor_t SET incontrolleve = $incontrolleve$, editableid='$editableid$',editablename='$editablename$', updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$', addoperatorid=$addoperatorid$,departmentid=$departmentid$ WHERE id = $id$
UPDATE p_hei_editor_t SET validflag=0, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select:
SELECT count(1) FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_hei_editor_t t2, sys_user_t t3, sys_department_t t4 WHERE t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.validflag>0 AND t2.addoperatorid = t3.id AND t3.departmentid = t4.id AND ( FIND_IN_SET($addoperatorid$,t2.editableid) OR t2.addoperatorid = $addoperatorid$ )
t2.incontrolleve = $incontrolleve$
t1.cardnumber like '%$cardnumber$%'
t1.personname like '%$personname$%'
t1.sexes like '%$sexes$%'
t1.nation like '%$nation$%'
t1.persontype like '%$persontype$%'
t1.homeplace like '%$homeplace$%'
t1.workplace like '%$workplace$%'
t1.homepolice like '%$homepolice$%'
t1.workpolice like '%$workpolice$%'

SELECT t1.*, t2.id as unitFilter, t2.addoperator AS jurisdictpolice, t3.contactnumber AS policephone, t4.departname AS jurisdictunit, t2.incontrolleve as incontrolleve, t2.editablename AS sqlall FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_hei_editor_t t2, sys_user_t t3, sys_department_t t4 WHERE t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.validflag>0 AND t2.addoperatorid = t3.id AND t3.departmentid = t4.id AND ( FIND_IN_SET($addoperatorid$,t2.editableid) OR t2.addoperatorid = $addoperatorid$ )
t2.incontrolleve = $incontrolleve$
t1.cardnumber like '%$cardnumber$%'
t1.personname like '%$personname$%'
t1.sexes like '%$sexes$%'
t1.nation like '%$nation$%'
t1.persontype like '%$persontype$%'
t1.homeplace like '%$homeplace$%'
t1.workplace like '%$workplace$%'
t1.homepolice like '%$homepolice$%'
t1.workpolice like '%$workpolice$%'
ORDER BY t1.id
SELECT * FROM p_hei_editor_t WHERE validflag > 0 AND personnelid = $personnelid$
SELECT * FROM p_hei_editor_t WHERE validflag > 0 AND id = $id$

SELECT gt.*, pt.personname,pt.cardnumber,pt.sexes,pt.usedname,pt.nickname,pt.marrystatus, pt.soldierstatus,pt.heathstatus,pt.politicalposition,pt.nation, pt.personheight, pt.faith,pt.education,pt.persontype,pt.houseplace,pt.housepolice,pt.netskillhabit, pt.homepolice,pt.workplace,pt.workpolice,pt.feature,pt.homeplace, pt.speciality,pt.records,rt.telnumber,rt.telephone,rt.relatedwifi,rt.relatedvehicle, rt.bankaccount,rt.netidentity,rt.netpayment,rt.relatedhouse, rt.relatedlegal,rt.relateddriver,rt.relatedpassport, rst.lifepattern,rst.healthstate,rst.characteristic,rst.lifehabit FROM p_hei_editor_t gt LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t pt ON gt.personnelid = pt.id LEFT JOIN p_relation_t rt ON gt.personnelid = rt.personnelid LEFT JOIN p_reality_show_t rst ON ( gt.personnelid = rst.personnelid AND rst.validflag = 1 AND rst.datalabel = 2 ) where gt.validflag>0
pt.cardnumber like '%$cardnumber$%'
pt.personname like '%$personname$%'
pt.sexes = '$sexes$'
pt.nation = '$nation$'
pt.persontype = '$persontype$'
pt.homeplace like '%$homeplace$%'
pt.workplace like '%$workplace$%'
pt.homepolice like '%$homepolice$%'
pt.workpolice like '%$workpolice$%'
gt.incontrolleve = '$incontrolleve$'

select A.incontrolleve,CASE A.incontrolleve WHEN 1 THEN '关注中' WHEN 2 THEN '已打击' END as text,count(k.id) as value from( select 1 as incontrolleve from dual UNION select 2 as incontrolleve from dual)A LEFT JOIN p_hei_editor_t k on k.incontrolleve=A.incontrolleve and k.validflag>0 LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t p on p.id=k.personnelid and p.validflag>0 GROUP BY A.incontrolleve ORDER BY A.incontrolleve;
